item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump!Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Saturday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

I C E
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We now have fake ads.
Don't....don't do this to me.

10/10 good pants
I need an axe.
This dump was brought to you by Bricks.
Ahhh fuck. I can't believe you've done this.
Foolish Mortals is a good thing to say to be honest
SUMMER IS ICUMMEN IN
(It's a Bingocard
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREAM! http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: Getting a Brazilian wax and then riding a motorcycle is not a great idea
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Corporate Culture
item.description: Company had a “re-org,” meaning they wanted to layoff people under the guise of reducing redundancy. I wasn’t laid off but demoted from Project Manager to Release Manager. I am the highest performing PM in the group and highly respected and the new Program Manager wanted me to work directly with him after the reopening-org. Management had meeting with COO and everyone wanted me to continue as PM but was denied. No solid explanation at all. The only thing I can think of is the last project I worked on was with a completely incompetent Client Success VP who wanted to dabble in Product Management threw me under the bus. This guy ignored all process and status reports. Caused all the engineers to want to quit. Scope creeped the project to oblivion. I spoke out against these activities with him and my boss the entire project. Had two senior level PMs speak directly to this VP and no change. I am being punished because I am not a VP I guess. Fuck this world fuck companies fuck it all. I quit and going to move back home with my dad and work at a grocery store.
item.dc:creator: nightmanchamp

item.title: Some Saturday Morning Memetoons
item.description:
I
Hope
Everyone
Reading
These
Has
A
Truly
Wonderful
Saturday.
It’s
Getting
Hot
In
Texas
These
Days.
Memes
Make
The
World
Go
‘Round.
I
Hope
In
100
Years
Memes
Will
Be
Considered
A
Love
Language.
GIFs
Too,
Honestly.
Be
Kind
To
Yourself! ?
item.dc:creator: professorwigglemuffins

item.title: Creatives Dump
item.description:
You should never trust us.
I resent the Spongebob creators saw my writing process.
Damn it, AI, that's my job!
Heresy!
I worked so hard for 20 minutes, time to just chill for the next 20 years.
Yes, this is what I signed up for said no author ever.
I swear, I'll get to backlog eventually.
I'm trying to set a tone, Word! Or Google, or whichever word processor this is.
Hehe. Good luck! Edit: Whoa! Most viral! If any of y'all could check out my podcast where I deconstruct popular media from a storytelling POV, I'd be grateful: www.theliterarymachine.com
And remember S8 of Game of Thrones.
I swear, the typos conspire to appear after all revisions.
I mean, that's the beauty of writing.
Here's hoping I'll remember them in the morning!
YES!
...yay?
And the cycle begins anew.
Fracking typos...
Encouragement is so motivational!
No, it's the audience who's wrong! Truly, though, I love reading more books on writing and taking courses to improve.
If you ask, I will bombard.
NEVER!
Just not Weird Al's Word Crimes
It just takes so long to get to the cool scenes I want to write.
How is it that characters seem to have minds of their own when they exist inside my own head?! Make it make sense!
That's some bullshit....
I am a pantser. The story is mostly complete in my brain, I just need to write it. Easy, right?
Forget the parenthesis and gimme those em dashes.
I mean, I don't want to spoil my own idea!
Because Iroh is everything.
item.dc:creator: TheLiteraryMachine

item.title: My cyberpunk tower city is finally complete. What do you think of it?
